# InsulationRValues.com

> Independent insulation reference. R-value charts, IECC 2021 code requirements
> (Table R402.1.3), material comparisons, climate zones, calculators, and
> installation guidance. All data sourced from primary documents (DOE, ORNL,
> Building Science Corporation, IECC, Energy Star, and manufacturer technical
> data). Cross-checked against multiple independent sources before publication.

## Reference data

- [R-Value Chart](https://insulationrvalues.com/r-value-chart): R-value per inch, total R-values, and installed cost for every common insulation material
- [R-Value Per Inch](https://insulationrvalues.com/r-value-per-inch): Ranked comparison with cost-per-R-value analysis and temperature derating notes
- [Climate Zone Map](https://insulationrvalues.com/climate-zone-map): IECC zones with state and city lookup
- [What Is R-Value](https://insulationrvalues.com/what-is-r-value): Definition, physics, and how to read R-value labels
- [Types of Insulation](https://insulationrvalues.com/types-of-insulation): Comprehensive comparison of all material categories

## 2021 IECC code requirements

The current model code (2021 IECC Table R402.1.3, residential prescriptive R-value table) sets these minimum ceiling/attic R-values by climate zone:

- Zone 1: R-30
- Zones 2-3: R-49
- Zones 4-8: R-60 (with R-49 acceptable if extended over wall top plates at the eaves)

Wood-frame wall minimums:

- Zones 1-2: R-13 cavity
- Zones 3-4 (not Marine): R-20 or R-13+5ci (continuous insulation)
- Zones 4 Marine and 5-8: R-20+5ci or R-13+10ci

Floor minimums:

- Zones 1-2: R-13
- Zones 3-4 (not Marine): R-19
- Zone 4 Marine and 5-6: R-30
- Zones 7-8: R-38

Always verify with local building department; states may amend the model code.

## Trust and methodology

- [About InsulationRValues.com](https://insulationrvalues.com/about): Methodology, sources, and the limits of the site (homeowner-built reference, not a substitute for licensed professional advice)
- [Editorial Policy](https://insulationrvalues.com/editorial-policy): How content is researched, cross-checked, and updated
- [Data Sources](https://insulationrvalues.com/data-sources): Every primary source cited across the site (DOE, ORNL, BSC, IECC, ASHRAE, RESNET, Energy Star, manufacturer specs)
- [Corrections Log](https://insulationrvalues.com/corrections): Public log of all published corrections with dates and what changed
- [Insulation Glossary](https://insulationrvalues.com/insulation-glossary): Definitions of 27 insulation and building-science terms with DefinedTerm schema
- [Contact](https://insulationrvalues.com/contact)
